message:
fix: fix Panel merge() calls and remove TitleAlignment export

Linter adapted Panel to use existing Borders/BorderType patterns.
Fixed Style::merge() to take reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,7 +23,7 @@ unicode-width = { version = "0.2", optional = true }
 canvas = ["dep:ftui-core", "dep:ftui-render", "dep:ftui-style"]
 charts = ["canvas"]
 clipboard = ["dep:base64", "dep:ftui-core"]
-console = ["dep:ftui-style", "dep:ftui-text", "dep:unicode-width"]
+console = ["dep:ftui-render", "dep:ftui-style", "dep:ftui-text", "dep:unicode-width"]
 clipboard-fallback = ["clipboard"]
 clipboard-logging = ["clipboard", "dep:tracing"]
 image = ["dep:base64", "dep:ftui-core", "dep:image"]
